data.name: Cookie_BannerText
data.value: We use cookies to understand how you use our site and to improve your experience.

data.name: Error_Subheader
data.value: An error occurred while processing your request.

data.name: Error_DevelopmentDescription
data.value: Switching to Development environment will display more detailed information about the error.

data.name: Error_DevelopmentWarning
data.value: The Development environment should not be enabled for deployed applications.

data.name: Error_DevelopmentHint
data.value: For local debugging set ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Development and restart the app.

data.name: Home_HistoryParagraph1
data.value: The history of chess can be traced back nearly 1500 years, although the earliest origins are uncertain. The earliest predecessor of the game probably originated in India, before the 6th century AD. From India, the game spread to Persia. When the Arabs conquered Persia, chess was taken up by the Muslim world and subsequently spread to Southern Europe. In Europe, chess evolved into roughly its current form in the 15th century.

data.name: Home_HistoryParagraph2
data.value: "Romantic chess" was the predominant playing style from the late 15th century to the 1880s. The Romantic era was followed by the Scientific, Hypermodern, and New Dynamism eras. In 1886 the first official World Chess Championship was held. In 1997, a computer defeated a world champion in the famous Deep Blue vs Garry Kasparov match. Later, online chess and computer analysis became widely available to everyone.

data.name: About_Description
data.value: The game is developed mainly for practicing C# OOP, ASP.NET Core, Entity Framework Core, JS, HTML and CSS. SignalR is integrated for live multiplayer and chessboardjs for board rendering.

data.name: About_InspiredBy
data.value: The project is inspired by the console version of chess:

data.name: About_HeroSupport
data.value: Designed for practical learning: clear architecture, real-time gameplay, and production-ready foundations.

data.name: About_MetaStackValue
data.value: ASP.NET Core MVC, SignalR, EF Core, SQL, JavaScript

data.name: About_MetaModeValue
data.value: Real-time rooms with synchronized board state

data.name: About_MediaGameText
data.value: Lobby, chat, board themes, and move history in one focused game workspace.

data.name: About_MediaConsoleText
data.value: The project keeps the spirit of the original console chess implementation.

data.name: About_FeaturesIntro
data.value: Core capabilities are grouped below for faster overview.

data.name: About_CtaText
data.value: Create a room, invite a friend, and play with synchronized moves and live status updates.

data.name: Js_BotJoinedGame
data.value: {name} joined as bot. The game started!

data.name: BotGame_Stalemate
data.value: Stalemate. The bot game ends in a draw.

data.name: Js_DrawRequestQuestionFormat
data.value: {name} requested a draw! Do you accept?

data.name: Id_LoginSubtitle
data.value: Use a local account to log in.

data.name: Id_LoginExternalTitle
data.value: Use another service to log in.

data.name: Id_NoExternalLoginProviders
data.value: There are no external authentication services configured. See this

data.name: Id_ExternalArticleLinkText
data.value: article about setting up external logins

data.name: Id_ConfirmEmailBody
data.value: Please confirm your account by clicking here.

data.name: Manage_SetPasswordInfo
data.value: You do not have a local username/password for this site. Add one so you can log in without an external login.

data.name: Manage_SetPhoneUnexpectedError
data.value: Unexpected error when trying to set phone number.

data.name: Identity_UnableToLoadUser
data.value: Unable to load user with ID '{0}'.

data.name: Validation_StringLength
data.value: The {0} must be at least {2} and at max {1} characters long.

data.name: Validation_PasswordMismatch
data.value: The password and confirmation password do not match.

data.name: Validation_NewPasswordMismatch
data.value: The new password and confirmation password do not match.

data.name: ConcurrencyFailure
data.value: Optimistic concurrency failure, object has been modified.

data.name: LoginAlreadyAssociated
data.value: A user with this login already exists.

data.name: InvalidUserName
data.value: User name '{0}' is invalid, can only contain letters or digits.

data.name: UserAlreadyHasPassword
data.value: User already has a password set.

data.name: UserLockoutNotEnabled
data.value: Lockout is not enabled for this user.

data.name: PasswordTooShort
data.value: Passwords must be at least {0} characters.

data.name: PasswordRequiresNonAlphanumeric
data.value: Passwords must have at least one non alphanumeric character.

data.name: PasswordRequiresDigit
data.value: Passwords must have at least one digit ('0'-'9').

data.name: PasswordRequiresLower
data.value: Passwords must have at least one lowercase ('a'-'z').

data.name: PasswordRequiresUpper
data.value: Passwords must have at least one uppercase ('A'-'Z').

data.name: PasswordRequiresUniqueChars
data.value: Passwords must use at least {0} different characters.

data.name: Manage_DeleteDataWarning
data.value: Deleting this data will permanently remove your account, and this cannot be recovered.

data.name: Id_RecoveryCodeVerificationDescription
data.value: You have requested to log in with a recovery code. This login will not be remembered until you provide an authenticator app code at log in or disable 2FA and log in again.

data.name: Manage_PersonalDataDescription
data.value: Your account contains personal data that you have given us. This page allows you to download or delete that data.

data.name: Manage_GenerateRecoveryCodesBody
data.value: Generating new recovery codes does not change the keys used in authenticator apps. If you wish to change the key used in an authenticator app, you should

data.name: Manage_CurrentBrowserForgotten
data.value: The current browser has been forgotten. You will be prompted for your 2FA code next login from this browser.

data.name: Id_LogoutSuccess
data.value: You have successfully logged out of the application.

data.name: Id_ConfirmEmailSuccess
data.value: Thank you for confirming your email.

data.name: Manage_EnableAuthenticatorStep3
data.value: After scanning the QR code or entering the key, your authenticator app will provide a unique code. Enter the code below.

data.name: Id_ExternalLoginInfoLoadConfirmationError
data.value: Error loading external login information during confirmation.

data.name: Id_UnableToLoadTwoFactorUser
data.value: Unable to load two-factor authentication user.

data.name: Manage_ChangeEmailConfirmationSent
data.value: Confirmation link to change email sent. Please check your email.

data.name: Id_RegisterConfirmationClickLink
data.value: Click here to confirm your account

data.name: Id_NoAuthenticatorDevice
data.value: Don't have access to your authenticator device? You can

data.name: Manage_MustAcceptPolicyFor2fa
data.value: You must accept the policy before you can enable two-factor authentication.

data.name: Manage_2faDisabledStatus
data.value: 2FA has been disabled. You can re-enable 2FA when you set up an authenticator app.

data.name: Manage_RemoveLoginTitle
data.value: Remove this {0} login from your account

data.name: Manage_GenerateNewRecoveryCodes
data.value: generate a new set of recovery codes

data.name: Manage_PrivacyNotAccepted
data.value: Privacy and cookie policy have not been accepted.

data.name: Id_RegisterConfirmationNoEmailSender
data.value: This app does not currently have a real email sender registered, see

data.name: Id_ResetPasswordEmailBody
data.value: Please reset your password by clicking here.

data.name: Manage_AuthenticatorKeyResetStatus
data.value: Your authenticator app key has been reset. Configure your authenticator app with the new key.

data.name: Id_AccessDeniedMessage
data.value: You do not have access to this resource.

data.name: Id_ForgotPasswordConfirmationMessage
data.value: Please check your email to reset your password.

data.name: Manage_NoRecoveryCodesLeft
data.value: You have no recovery codes left.

data.name: Id_UnableToLoadUserByEmail
data.value: Unable to load user with email '{0}'.

data.name: Manage_ExternalLoginNotRemoved
data.value: The external login was not removed.

data.name: Manage_DeleteDataAndCloseAccount
data.value: Delete data and close my account

data.name: Id_RegisterConfirmationCheckEmail
data.value: Please check your email to confirm your account.

data.name: Id_ResetPasswordConfirmationMessage
data.value: Your password has been reset. Please

data.name: Id_LoginWithRecoveryCodeLink
data.value: log in with a recovery code

data.name: Id_LockoutMessage
data.value: This account has been locked out, please try again later.

data.name: Id_ExternalLoginDescription
data.value: You've successfully authenticated with {0}. Please enter an email address for this site below and click Register to finish logging in.

data.name: Manage_ResetAuthenticatorBody
data.value: This process disables 2FA until you verify your authenticator app. If you do not complete configuration, you may lose access to your account.

data.name: Manage_CannotGenerateRecoveryCodes
data.value: Cannot generate recovery codes for user because 2FA is not enabled.

data.name: Manage_ExternalLoginLoadInfoError
data.value: Unexpected error occurred loading external login info.

data.name: Manage_Disable2faWarningBody
data.value: Disabling 2FA does not change the keys used in authenticator apps. If you wish to change the key used in an authenticator app, you should

data.name: Id_VerificationEmailSent
data.value: Verification email sent. Please check your email.

data.name: Id_ResetPasswordCodeRequired
data.value: A code must be supplied for password reset.

data.name: Manage_EnableAuthenticatorIntro
data.value: To use an authenticator app, follow these steps:

data.name: Manage_RecoveryCodesLossWarning
data.value: If you lose your device and do not have recovery codes, you will lose access to your account.

data.name: Manage_RecoveryCodesGenerated
data.value: You have generated new recovery codes.

data.name: Manage_CannotDisable2fa
data.value: Cannot disable 2FA for user because it is not currently enabled.

data.name: Manage_ResetAuthenticatorWarning
data.value: If you reset your authenticator key, your authenticator app will not work until you reconfigure it.

data.name: Manage_ExternalLoginNotAdded
data.value: The external login was not added. External logins can only be associated with one account.

data.name: Manage_EnableAuthenticatorStep1
data.value: Download a two-factor authenticator app like Microsoft Authenticator for

data.name: Manage_AuthenticatorVerified
data.value: Your authenticator app has been verified.

data.name: Manage_EnableAuthenticatorStep2
data.value: Scan the QR code or enter this key {0} into your authenticator app. Spaces and casing do not matter.

data.name: Id_EmailChangeConfirmed
data.value: Thank you for confirming your email change.

data.name: Manage_AddAnotherLoginService
data.value: Add another service to log in.

data.name: Id_TwoFactorDescription
data.value: Your login is protected with an authenticator app. Enter your authenticator code below.

data.name: Manage_PutCodesInSafePlace
data.value: Put these codes in a safe place.

data.name: Stats_NoGamesYet
data.value: Play games to see chart statistics.

data.name: Js_CheckEscapeHint
data.value: escape with king, block, or capture

data.name: Hub_Error_MessageRateLimited
data.value: You are sending messages too fast. Please wait a moment.

data.name: Hub_Error_NameInvalid
data.value: Name must be 3-20 chars and contain only letters, numbers, and underscores.
